audit_items.proof_trace: All three required validations (auctionLive at L425-427, bidValue at L433-435, balance at L438-440) execute before the first asset transfer at L444. The reentrancy guard is set at L418, before any transfer, blocking re-entry into bid(). The optimistic-transfer-then-callback pattern (transfer at L444, callback at L449, pull assetOut at L453) is safe because L453 is unconditional and a failure reverts the entire transaction.
